greeting.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
greeting.text: You should not be here. The chapel is... changed. Something stirs below.

warn-crypt.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
warn-crypt.text: An ash ghoul. Once a brother of this order. Now it guards the crypt with hollow fury. Take this, you may need it.

relic-info.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
relic-info.text: The Ember Sigil rests in the crypt alcove, beyond the vestry. But the ghoul will not let you pass without a fight.

dismiss.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
dismiss.text: Confidence is not armor. Remember that.

end-gift.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
end-gift.text: A healing draught. May it serve you well. Go with caution.

end-info.speaker: Suspicious Pilgrim
end-info.text: Be careful, wanderer. The dead here do not rest easily.
